version_description: This version uses more complex chords (add9, 6, maj7 etc.) to emphasize the note being sung in the melody as well as slash chords to bring out the bass note in the chorus (stepwise ascending scale A, B, C#, D#).
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
[ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]C#m[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
  Monday night and I feel so low[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                          [ch]G#m[/ch]
  I count the hours, but they go so slow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]                              [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
I know the sound of your voice can save my soul[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
  City lights, streets of gold[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                        [ch]G#m[/ch]
  Look out my window to the world below[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]  
Moves so fast, but it feels so cold[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I'm all alone (All alone)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A6[/ch]           [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Don't let me die[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A6[/ch]        [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
I'm losing my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  Baby, just give me a sign[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
And now that you're gone[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
I just wanna be with you (Be with you)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
And I can't go on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
I wanna be with you (Be with you)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A6[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Wanna be with you[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
  I can't sleep, I'm up all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                     [ch]G#m[/ch]
  Through these tears, I try to smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]        [ch]C#m[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
  I know the touch of your hand can save my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A6[/ch]           [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
But don't let me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]A6[/ch]         [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Come to me now[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  I got to be with you somehow[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
And now that you're gone[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
I just wanna be with you (Be with you)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
And I can't go on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
I wanna be with you (Be with you)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A6[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Wanna be with you[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  I got to be with you somehow[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
And now that you're gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
   Who am I without you now?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
I can't go on[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
I just wanna be with you (Be with you)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
And now that you're gone[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
I just wanna be with you (Be with you)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
And I can't go on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
I wanna be with you (Wanna be with)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
And now that you're gone[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
Just wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Aadd9[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
And I can't go on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]
I wanna be with you[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Aadd9[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
    Just wanna be with you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
Just wanna be with you[/tab]
